capabilities_used.evidence: 他反复把“global liquidity”作为 BTC 的先行变量。2025-04-11: “As the business cycle bottoms (red zones), global liquidity leads Bitcoin. Whatever it does, Bitcoin does a few months later.” 2024-07-13: “Global Liquidity ←→ #Bitcoin 3.75 Years.”
虽然他不一定直接用 PMI，但核心框架就是“business cycle inflection”。2025-10-10: “Always been the business cycle…”；2025-07-25: “Bitcoin tops when it tops. Bitcoin goes parabolic when it inflects.”
他大量使用“compression -> expansion”叙事。2025-05-23: “We quite literally have never seen altcoin compression like this.” 图4、图6都在画多年压缩后的三角/带状收敛，等待扩张。

他明确把 BTC dominance 作为 altseason 触发器。2024-11-27: “#Bitcoin reaching the green line means it has expanded to the extent where its market cap begins to rotate substantially into #altcoins.” 2026-01-30: “Watch BTC dominance. About to leg down as BTC resets.”
他不是只看上涨，而是明确区分 ramp phase 与 parabolic phase，并用冲顶条件定义顶部。2025-11-12: “The record long pre-parabolic phase may finally be nearing its end.” 图5/图8中把“Parabolic”单独标成阶段，并以红色峰值定义顶部。
他常用“global risk index turned positive”这类跨资产风险偏好指标来确认加密大行情。2025-09-17: “Bitcoin has never had its hockey stick inflection until this global risk index crossed positive.”
图6明显是多年上升三角形/压缩末端：上方水平阻力、下方抬高低点，并标注“4 years of compression”。这与他对 altcoin market breakout 的表述一致。
2025-05-20 他直接写: “When cup-and-handles hit with precision. Bitcoin’s turn…” 说明会使用经典延续形态辅助确认。
他持续把市场划分为 bear / pre-parabolic / parabolic / ramp 等阶段，本质上是在做高时间框架 regime classification。图5、图8直接分区标注各阶段。
他频繁讨论传统“4 year cycle”，但主要是拿来修正和反驳。2025-10-10: “Never been a 4 year Bitcoin cycle… Always been the business cycle…” 说明他熟悉这个框架，但不把它当主驱动。
同样地，他经常把减半周期作为市场常识的对照项，但核心观点是减半不是因而是巧合共振。2025-10-10 明确否定“Never been the halving.”
他大量使用 RSI 极值/通道来标顶部和阶段，但并非标准背离用法。2024-06-24: “A single RSI channel has called every macro $BTC top and bottom.” 更准确地说，这是 RSI 结构通道，不只是背离。
同上，他也用 RSI 的底部极值区来标宏观底，但主要还是通道/状态框架。图5 下方 business cycle signal 与上方价格/阶段联动，偏向多周期状态识别。
图8图例里直接写了“x USD top then red bars top”，说明他把美元周期顶部与 BTC/加密顶部联系起来；这是其宏观框架的一部分，但不如 liquidity/business cycle 核心。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Business Cycle Inflection Engine
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Model Bitcoin and altcoin major phases from the global business cycle rather than the halving calendar. When the business cycle bottoms and turns up, crypto enters ramp/expansion; when it tops, crypto tops.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 用全球商业周期而不是减半日历来定义 BTC/山寨的大级别阶段。商业周期见底回升时进入爬坡/扩张，商业周期见顶时加密周期见顶。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-10-10: “Always been the business cycle…”；2025-07-25: “Bitcoin tops when it tops. Bitcoin goes parabolic when it inflects.”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Global Liquidity Breakout-Retest Lead
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 全球流动性突破回踩领先信号
new_capabilities_proposed.description: A specific macro trigger where global liquidity breaks out, retests the breakout, then surges higher; Bitcoin and altcoins typically follow with a lag and enter their strongest expansion phase.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 一种特定宏观触发器：全球流动性先突破、再回踩确认、随后继续上冲；BTC 与山寨通常滞后跟随，并进入最强扩张段。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-03-22: “liquidity retested its breakout and is surging higher… Right as the business cycle bottomed and reversed.” 2025-04-08/04-11 也连续强调 liquidity breakout after retest。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: RSI Channel Macro Extremes
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use a persistent RSI channel or band structure on higher timeframes to mark macro tops, bottoms, and mid-cycle inflections instead of simple overbought/oversold thresholds.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 在高时间框架上用 RSI 的长期通道/带状结构来标记宏观顶部、底部和中段拐点，而不是简单依赖超买超卖阈值。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2024-06-24: “A single RSI channel has called every macro $BTC top and bottom.” 图1也展示了一个沿历史周期重复工作的上方白线/下方震荡结构。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Multi-Year Altcoin Compression Release
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Detect extreme multi-year compression in the total altcoin market, followed by structural breakout or expansion signal. Used as a precursor to a broad altseason rather than a single-token setup.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 识别山寨整体市值在多年压缩后的结构性突破/扩张信号，作为广义 altseason 的前驱，而不是单个币的形态交易。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-05-23: “never seen altcoin compression like this”; 2025-07-20: “Four years of altcoin compression is releasing.” 图6直接标注“4 years of compression”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Cycle Histogram Phase State Machine
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Interpret custom histogram color and slope changes as discrete market states: bear decline, bottoming, ramp, pre-parabolic, and top. Tops are marked by red-bar peaks; bottoms by green-turn transitions.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 将自定义柱状图的颜色与斜率变化解释为离散市场状态：熊市下跌、筑底、爬坡、准抛物线、顶部。红柱峰值标顶，转绿标底/起涨。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图3、图5、图8都在用同一类红绿柱状 business cycle / impulse 信号；2025-08-21: “Every Bitcoin top was marked exactly by a red bar top. We're not even out of green.”

personal_quirks.quote: Cycles over news.  Data over emotion.  History over “this time is different”.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 优先信历史周期与数据，不被当下叙事和情绪带偏。

personal_quirks.quote: There is a Bitcoin cycle - just not what many think.  It mirrors the business cycle.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: BTC 周期存在，但真正的锚不是减半，而是商业周期。

personal_quirks.quote: No talk of tops until the red line.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 在其自定义顶部触发线未到之前，不讨论见顶，避免过早做空。

personal_quirks.quote: The highly-levered do not get to ride the bucking bull. It's that simple.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 大级别牛市可以看对，但高杠杆容易被中途波动甩下车。
尽量把复杂市场压缩成少数高时间框架核心变量来判断。

unique_traits: 他和常见 TA 交易员最大的不同，是把 Bitcoin/altcoins 主要视为“商业周期 + 全球流动性”驱动的宏观周期资产，而不是单纯图形或减半叙事资产。其次，他喜欢把复杂市场压缩成少数高时间框架状态机信号，比如红绿柱、RSI 通道、dominance 切换、compression-release。风格上非常逆主流，持续对抗“这次不一样”“已经见顶”的市场共识。

high_conviction_phrases: No talk of tops until the red line
We're not even out of green
This has always been the setup
low_conviction_phrases: may finally be nearing its end
